summary: Frontend-only testing of NovaNest landing page completed successfully. All 9 sections render, all interactive elements work, and responsive layouts verified at 390px / 768px / 1440px+. No console or page errors encountered.
critical_code_review_comments: Theme toggle UX: in dark mode the icon shown is a Sun and in light mode a Moon. The convention is intentional (icon represents the mode you'll switch to), but some users find it counter-intuitive. Consider showing the current-mode icon. Non-blocking.
Footer year is hardcoded via new Date().getFullYear() — fine. Newsletter form does only client-side validation and resets after 2.4s — acceptable per problem statement (intentional local-state only).

ThemeProvider stores preference in localStorage as 'novanest-theme' and reads on mount. Note: initial render is always 'dark' before useEffect runs, which is correct given the requirement (default dark).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Landing page is fully working. All data-testids match the spec. Verified flows: page load (no console errors), navbar (logo, 4 nav links, theme toggle, sign in, get started), hero (headline 'Organize your life with AI', subheadline, both CTAs, animated MiniDashboard mockup), Watch Demo modal open/close, Get Started sonner toast 'Welcome to NovaNest', TrustedBy marquee visible, 6 feature cards, Dashboard preview section visible, 4 testimonials, 3 pricing tiers (Pro shows 'Most popular' and glow), billing toggle Monthly=$12 Yearly=$9 for Pro, FAQ accordion expand/collapse (6 items), CTA banner 'Start building better habits today', Footer newsletter form (email + Notify me -> 'Done' state on submit), social icons (twitter/github/linkedin), 4 link columns. Theme toggle switches html class between 'dark' and 'light'. Mobile hamburger menu opens/closes at 390px viewport with all 4 nav links. Anchor IDs #top, #features, #dashboard, #pricing, #faq all exist and nav-link clicks scroll appropriately. ScrollProgress and CursorGlow components present in DOM.
